subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who alone hath borne the sorrows of all who dwell in the realm of possibility, and Who alone hath endured the trials of all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالاحزان عمن فی الامکان و تفرد بالبلایا عما یطلق
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @law of fasting, @praise and encouragement, @law of inheritance, @wisdom [hikmat]
